# GitMash 🧬

**AI-powered repo synthesis.** Paste 2–3 GitHub URLs, describe your preferences, and get a unified project with merged code, tests, docs, and dev logs — all generated by AI agents.

## How it works

1. **Submit repos** — paste GitHub URLs + a build brief describing what you want
2. **Auto-analyze** — each repo is statically analyzed (stack, deps, routes, components, risks)
3. **AI synthesis** — agents generate a merge plan based on your preferences
4. **Build** — decisions are applied, dependencies are harmonized, docs are generated
5. **Validate & repair** — the output is linted, typechecked, and tested with auto-repair
6. **Code review** — heuristic + AI review of the final project
7. **Export** — download the unified project as a ZIP

## Stack

- **Next.js 15** (App Router)
- **TypeScript** (strict)
- **Tailwind CSS** + **shadcn/ui**
- **Node.js built-in test runner** (`node:test`)
- **OpenAI** (`gpt-5.5`) — model-agnostic provider interface, swapable to Anthropic/Grok/Ollama

## Quick start

```bash
npm install
npm run dev        # http://localhost:3000
```

## Verification

```bash
npm test           # 80 tests across 33 suites
npm run build      # production build
```

## Architecture

```
lib/                          # Core pipeline (30 modules)
├── github.ts                 # URL parser + validation
├── repo-cloner.ts            # Git shallow clone + metadata
├── stack-detector.ts         # Framework / package detection
├── dependency-analyzer.ts    # Dep merging + risk flags
├── route-detector.ts         # API route detection
├── component-map.ts          # Component / service classifiers
├── risk-report.ts            # Security + quality risk audit
├── repo-analyzer.ts          # Orchestrator (all detectors)
├── digest-generator.ts       # 14-section repo summary
├── source-chunker.ts         # File extraction + chunking
├── ai-provider.ts            # Model-agnostic provider
├── agent-runner.ts           # Retry + validation loop
├── merge-planner.ts          # Base selection + decisions
├── build-planner.ts          # DAG topological sort
├── build-engine.ts           # Full build orchestration
├── file-copier.ts            # File copy / import rewrite
├── doc-generator.ts          # 8 required output docs
├── command-detector.ts       # Lint/typecheck/test detection
├── command-runner.ts         # Safe command execution
├── repair-loop.ts            # Auto-repair (3 attempts)
├── code-review.ts            # Heuristic + AI code review
└── export-archiver.ts        # ZIP export

app/api/projects/             # 10 REST API route handlers
components/                   # 7 React components (UI)
tests/                        # 26 test files, 80 tests
```

## API Routes

| Method | Route | Description |
|--------|-------|-------------|
| POST | `/api/projects` | Create project (submit repos + brief) |
| GET | `/api/projects/[id]` | Get project status |
| GET | `/api/projects/[id]/repos` | Get repo analysis results |
| POST | `/api/projects/[id]/plan` | Generate merge plan |
| GET | `/api/projects/[id]/plan` | View merge plan |
| POST | `/api/projects/[id]/plan/approve` | Approve plan and start build |
| POST | `/api/projects/[id]/build` | Execute build |
| GET | `/api/projects/[id]/build` | Build status + logs |
| POST | `/api/projects/[id]/review` | Run code review |
| GET | `/api/projects/[id]/export` | Download ZIP |

## Output Docs

Every build generates 8 markdown docs:

- `README.md` — project overview
- `PROJECT_SPEC.md` — detailed spec
- `ARCHITECTURE.md` — system architecture
- `MERGE_PLAN.md` — human-readable merge decisions
- `DECISIONS.md` — key build decisions
- `TESTING.md` — test strategy
- `DEVLOG.md` — build log
- `AGENT_HANDOFF.md` — detailed handoff for AI agents

## Local Storage

```
workspaces/<project-id>/      # Cloned repos
analysis/<project-id>/        # Analysis results
output/<project-id>/          # Final built project
```

---

Built with [Next.js](https://nextjs.org/) + [shadcn/ui](https://ui.shadcn.com/) + [OpenAI](https://openai.com/).
